title: ervatamia balansae
intro: Ervatamia balansae, also known as the Balansa vine or Snake root, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the nervous system, relieve pain, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ervatamia balansae include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic agent. Ervatamia balansae can be prepared as a tincture, decoction, or powder for use in herbal medicine, although its effects and safety should be further researched and validated.
